puzzle.title: The Unexpected Glad Tidings
puzzle.intro: A pivotal moment in a prophet's household hinged on a divine message delivered by unexpected guests. An individual, whose very existence was deemed impossible by human standards, became a sign of Allah's boundless power. Who is this figure, born from a promise that defied age and nature?
clues: My coming was announced by honored guests who visited my father.
My mother reacted with astonishment, striking her face and calling herself a barren old woman.
The messengers who announced my birth also had another mission: to deal with a sinful people nearby.
I am the son of one of Allah's greatest messengers, and my own son would also become a prophet.
My name is mentioned alongside my father's and my son's in the Quran as part of a lineage of guidance.
The glad tidings given to my parents were specifically of a 'knowledgeable son' (ghulamin 'aleem).

trial.label: The Core Event
options: Being Saved from a Sacrificial Command
Receiving Glad Tidings of a Miraculous Birth
Praying for an Heir in a Sanctuary
Building the Kaaba with a Parent
Interpreting the Dreams of a Ruler
trial.answer: Receiving Glad Tidings of a Miraculous Birth

location.label: The Messengers
options: A Voice from a Burning Bush

outcome.label: The Result
options: A Nation was Saved from Drowning
A People were Punished with a Flood

puzzle.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
puzzle.verse: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy. (51:28)
